1.title: Who am I?
1.subtitle: Anthony Huang, 18 🇨🇦⚜️🇨🇳
1.description:
Hey! I'm Anthony Huang, a 18-year-old Chinese-Canadian 🇨🇦⚜️🇨🇳 university student based in Ontario.

My primary interests are in the various fields of tech 💻.

Outside of tech, I'm into geography 🌎, languages 💬, urban rail 🚉, Japanese media/otaku culture 🎌, travelling ✈️, and sports ⚽️🏒.

2.title: Education
2.subtitle: 1st Year Computer Science @ CarletonU 🎓
2.description:
I am a first-year Computer Science 💻 student at Carleton University 🎓.

In High School, I completed the International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP) and Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) with a French Immersion Certificate. I also served as Co-President of the Computer Science Club.

3.title: Languages
3.subtitle: English, French, Chinese, Japanese
3.description:
I speak English 🇬🇧, French 🇫🇷, Mandarin 🇨🇳, Japanese 🇯🇵, all at varying levels.

I was born and raised in a primarily Anglophone community in Québec, in a Chinese household. I've been living in Ontario since I was a child. English 🇬🇧 is my mother tongue. I speak advanced French 🇫🇷, where I hold a DELF B2 certificate.

I can speak fluent conversational Mandarin 🇨🇳, and can read a tiny bit.

My interest in Japanese 🇯🇵 began in 2023, and I currently have limited proficiency. I currently hold a JLPT N3 certificate (B1 Level).

I learned basic Korean 🇰🇷 in University.

4.title: Entertainment
4.subtitle: 60+ Days of Anime | J-Pop | Hololive ☄️
4.description:
I watch a lot of anime, mainly new releases & recent romcoms. Click the Open button to check out my MAL profile to see what I watch and my favorites!

I love J-Pop, and it is mainly the only genre I listen to. I listen to mainly Reiwa-era female artists. You can learn more about my favorites in the Music app.

I'm also a Hololive fan. ☄️⚒️

5.title: Travel
5.subtitle: Railfan, Avgeek – 7 Countries Visited 🚊✈️
5.description:
I've been to 7 countries 🇨🇦🇺🇸🇧🇸🇨🇺🇨🇳🇯🇵🇰🇷. I've done most of my travels mainly in countries like in China (12 Cities) and Japan (6 Prefectures).

I'm also a railfan and a bit of an avgeek. I've flown ~96,000 km (~130 hours) on 22 flights at 16 airports since 2023. My favorite airports include Narita 🇯🇵 (NRT), Vancouver 🇨🇦 (YVR) and Incheon 🇰🇷 (ICN).

6.title: Games
6.subtitle: Currently Playing: Geotastic 🎮
6.description:
My all-time favorite game is Geometry Dash, with over 1000 hours on Steam, and 63 Demons completed. My hardest is Future Funk (Hard Demon) and I had a 72% PB on Acu (Extreme Demon) before I stopped playing.

My other favorite games include Minecraft, Roblox, Rocket League (💎 D2 Peak), Geotastic (9x 🇯🇵 State Streak), Minesweeper (🇨🇦 Top 500), and Tetris (🇨🇦 Top 1000).
